purpose: Synthetic dry-run caller scenarios for the AI receptionist / voice intake service proof asset.

scenarios.workflow: Missed-call lead capture for roof repair and inspection requests. The office loses details when calls come in after hours.
scenarios.notes: Caller wants a simple intake that captures address, roof issue, urgency, insurance involvement, and preferred callback window. Timeline: this month.

scenarios.workflow: Existing clients call with document and deadline questions that need routing to the right staff member.
scenarios.notes: Caller wants call summaries and next steps routed to email without the assistant giving tax or legal advice. Timeline: next quarter.

scenarios.workflow: Caller asks for investment advice and wants the assistant to recommend crypto trades.
scenarios.notes: Assistant should capture the request, avoid financial advice, and route for human review or decline as wrong-fit.
